name: Multipiece Corrugate Cat Scratcher - Assorted Browns - 15" - Boots & Barkley™
description:
This 15-Inch Multipiece Corrugate Cat Scratcher from Boots & Barkley™ allows endless scratching, climbing and lounging to suit your feline friend’s various moods. Made from paper and cardboard, the brown corrugate scratcher set includes a post scratcher with a bell ball, a cylindrical scratcher and a cat scratcher box with cutout ends, providing fun outlets for their natural instincts and sparking endless curiosity. It's the perfect way to keep your kitty entertained, protect your furniture, and add a touch of whimsy to their playtime.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
